raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assemblymember Alex Lee secured $2 million from the state budget to help Newark revitalize the Old Town neighborhood.",
    "The funding aims to improve residents' living environments and quality of life in Newark.",
    "One million dollars were allocated towards the Old Town Streetscape Improvement Project.",
    "The Old Town Streetscape Improvement Project aims to catalyze private investment by improving access, safety, and connections for pedestrians, bicyclists, and transit users.",
    "The project will include installing new bike lanes and crosswalks, widening sidewalks for outdoor dining, enhancing landscaping areas, and creating urban plazas.",
    "Another $1 million in state funding has been secured for the Newark Resource Center Project.",
    "The Newark Resource Center will serve as an entry point for social services in the city.",
    "The Newark Resource Center will provide on-site assistance and refer residents to social service agencies.",
    "The project for the Newark Resource Center is currently in the design development phase, with construction planned to begin in spring 2024.",
    "Assemblymember Lee has secured a total of $5.8 million in state funding for Newark over the past two years.",
    "Funding in the 2022-2023 state budget was designated to implement Quiet Zones and improve the city's broadband infrastructure."
  ]
}
```
